records.title: BNP Paribas freezes three investment funds
records.significance: First major signal of subprime contagion in Europe

records.title: Northern Rock bank run
records.significance: First UK bank run in 150 years

records.title: Bear Stearns acquired by JPMorgan Chase
Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac placed into conservatorship
records.significance: US government takes over mortgage giants

records.title: Lehman Brothers files for bankruptcy
records.significance: Largest bankruptcy in US history; global panic trigger

records.title: Emergency Economic Stabilization Act signed (TARP)
records.significance: $700 billion Troubled Asset Relief Program enacted

records.title: Fed cuts rates to 0-0.25% (zero lower bound)
records.significance: Federal funds rate reaches effective floor

records.title: S&P 500 reaches crisis low at 676.53
records.significance: Market bottom; 57% decline from Oct 2007 peak

records.title: NBER declares recession ended (retroactively June 2009)
records.significance: Official end date of the Great Recession
